prompt: Photorealistic luxury stationery photography. Premium thick business cards on a dark surface, shot from overhead. The cards are printed on heavy dark charcoal (#2C2C2C) stock. The logo is embossed on the card — a pentagon shape formed by taking a rectangle and slicing off only the top-right corner at a 45-degree diagonal, creating a five-sided shape (flat bottom, flat left side, flat top until three-quarters across, then a diagonal cut down to the right side, flat right side). This pentagon shape is filled with gold foil (#C9A96E). The letters LK are debossed into the gold foil pentagon, revealing the dark card beneath. A thin gold foil line runs along the bottom inside the shape. Below reads DESIGN AND BUILD in refined small gold foil capitals with generous letter-spacing. Multiple cards artfully scattered on dark slate surface, edge gilding visible in gold. Shot on 50mm macro f/2.8, soft directional lighting, premium print finishing, Adelaide construction company branding, cinematic, photorealistic.
